The '''Mu-2 long range shuttle''' was a 20-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] long [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] long-range [[Scout ship/Legends|scout ship]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Mu-sct-tur.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A Mu-2 class flies over a wrecked [[SCT Scout craft|SCT Scout Craft]]]]
It carried a pilot, a co-pilot, 14 [[Soldier/Legends|troops]], 100 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo, and 6 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] worth of [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]]. The ship had a Class 2 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], and a Class 20 [[Backup hyperdrive|backup]]. 850 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per hour could be achieved in [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. [[Deflector shield/Legends|Deflector shields]] were supplemented by 2 fire-linked forward [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. It was produced in two models. The Model 1 had more seats and was designed to carry 24 passengers. Although the Model 2 carried fewer passengers than the original variety, it had four enclosed sleeping cabins, and boasted a miniature galley.<ref name="UR">''[[The Unknown Regions]]''</ref>

==History==
The [[Radell Mining Corporation]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] all employed the Mu-2. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] possessed a modified Mu-2, the ''[[Cobra]]''.
